## Summary

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e`
- [ ] `npm run smoke:package`
- [ ] `npm run check:launch-page`
- [ ] `npm run check:release`
- [ ] `npm pack --dry-run --ignore-scripts --json`
- [ ] `npm audit --audit-level=moderate`

## Safety

- [ ] No real secrets, private MCP configs, tokens, cookies, or local private paths are committed.
- [ ] MCP/import/export changes include redaction coverage.
- [ ] UI changes include a screenshot or short clip.
